note.zh: 在隔离测评工作区中，通过 Claude Code 2.1.216 以精确匹配的 Kimi K3（运行时模型 ID k3，Max）使用仓库标准中文提示词在一次测评会话中生成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 mythiccraft.html 按案例规范逐字节复制为 mythos-craft.html。该历史运行使用 Claude Code 的 256K 上下文窗口（262,144 tokens）。原生系统提示正常启用，空工作区未注入 AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、额外上下文文件、Skill、插件或 MCP，Web Search 与 WebFetch 未开放。模型已写出语法完整的 HTML 后，收尾调用因 Kimi Code 额度返回 403；本页是报错前已冻结的原始产物。
note.en: Generated in one benchmark session from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by the exactly matched Kimi K3 runtime model (model ID k3, Max) through Claude Code 2.1.216 in an isolated workspace, with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from the model-written mythiccraft.html to mythos-craft.html. This historical run used Claude Code with a 256K context window (262,144 tokens). The native system prompt remained enabled, while the empty workspace received no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, extra context files, skills, plugins, or MCP, and Web Search and WebFetch were unavailable. After the model had written a syntactically complete HTML file, a closing API call returned a Kimi Code quota 403; this page is the original artifact frozen before that error.

note.zh: 在隔离测评工作区中，通过 Claude Code 2.1.216 以精确匹配的 Kimi K3（运行时模型 ID k3，Max）使用仓库标准中文提示词在一次测评会话中生成，进程正常完成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 pelican_beach_bike.svg 按案例规范逐字节复制为 pelican-cycling.svg。该历史运行使用 Claude Code 的 256K 上下文窗口（262,144 tokens）。原生系统提示正常启用，空工作区未注入 AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、额外上下文文件、Skill、插件或 MCP，Web Search 与 WebFetch 未开放。
note.en: Generated in one successfully completed benchmark session from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by the exactly matched Kimi K3 runtime model (model ID k3, Max) through Claude Code 2.1.216 in an isolated workspace, with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from the model-written pelican_beach_bike.svg to pelican-cycling.svg. This historical run used Claude Code with a 256K context window (262,144 tokens). The native system prompt remained enabled, while the empty workspace received no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, extra context files, skills, plugins, or MCP, and Web Search and WebFetch were unavailable.

note.zh: 在隔离测评工作区中，通过 Claude Code 2.1.216 以精确匹配的 Kimi K3（运行时模型 ID k3，Max）使用仓库标准中文提示词在一次测评会话中生成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 index.html 按案例规范逐字节复制为 skeleton-watch.html。该历史运行使用 Claude Code 的 256K 上下文窗口（262,144 tokens）。原生系统提示正常启用，空工作区未注入 AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、额外上下文文件、Skill、插件或 MCP，Web Search 与 WebFetch 未开放。模型已写出完整 HTML，随后进程达到 1800 秒墙钟超时；本页是超时前已冻结且通过静态语法检查的原始产物。
note.en: Generated in one benchmark session from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by the exactly matched Kimi K3 runtime model (model ID k3, Max) through Claude Code 2.1.216 in an isolated workspace, with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from the model-written index.html to skeleton-watch.html. This historical run used Claude Code with a 256K context window (262,144 tokens). The native system prompt remained enabled, while the empty workspace received no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, extra context files, skills, plugins, or MCP, and Web Search and WebFetch were unavailable. The model had written the complete HTML before the process reached its 1,800-second wall timeout; this page is the original frozen artifact and passes static syntax checking.

note.zh: 在隔离测评工作区中，通过 Claude Code 2.1.216 以精确匹配的 Kimi K3（运行时模型 ID k3，Max）使用仓库标准中文提示词在一次测评会话中生成的完整 Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Three.js 工程，源码未经人工修改。该历史运行使用 Claude Code 的 256K 上下文窗口（262,144 tokens）。原生系统提示正常启用，空工作区未注入 AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、额外上下文文件、Skill、插件或 MCP，Web Search 与 WebFetch 未开放。模型完成源码、构建与浏览器冒烟检查后，最后一次提供商调用瞬时失败；公开仓保留当时已冻结的原始源码与模型写出的测试，仅排除依赖目录 node_modules 和生成的 dist 构建目录，站点部署时从源码重新构建。
note.en: A complete Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Three.js project generated in one benchmark session from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt by the exactly matched Kimi K3 runtime model (model ID k3, Max) through Claude Code 2.1.216 in an isolated workspace, with no human edits to the source. This historical run used Claude Code with a 256K context window (262,144 tokens). The native system prompt remained enabled, while the empty workspace received no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, extra context files, skills, plugins, or MCP, and Web Search and WebFetch were unavailable. After the model completed the source, build, and browser smoke checks, the final provider call failed transiently. The public repository preserves the frozen original source and model-written tests, excluding only the node_modules dependency directory and generated dist build directory; the site rebuilds it from source during deployment.
